raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX of XXXX, several fraudulent charges were made on my former credit card. I reported these charges in XXXX, XXXX, when my XXXX statement arrived. There were several fraudulent charges on that statement, some of which were removed. However, XXXX amounts of {$720.00} and {$770.00} have remained on my statement continually under " Promotional Purchases, deferred interest. '' I have called XXXX XXXX XXXX. repeatedly and written letters with no success in getting these items removed from my account. The " promotional deferred interest '' offer has expired as of XX/XX/XXXX, and now I am being charged extremely high interest charges on these fraudulent charges.
